name: Burnt Sugar Butter Cream Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the butter, confectioner's sugar, salt, vanilla extract, and burnt sugar syrup. Blend until smooth.
2. Gradually add the light cream (1-2 tablespoons) and finely chopped pecans to the mixture. Continue blending until all ingredients are well incorporated.
3. Use this frosting to ice a cooled Burnt Sugar cake.
